article_meta.title: Trump’s Texas Deal Dilemma It’s Not Islamophobia, It’s Islamo-I’m-Sick-of-Hearing-About-It CNN Proves False Narratives A

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted/attributed material and non-author site/link text as author bias, used non-approved bias labels, and missed several clear instances in the author's own prose. It also wrapped the output in code fences, violating the output format.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged quoted/attributed content (Magaziner quote; embedded tweets) as author bias, violating attribution rules.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several items were not the author’s connecting prose (other article headlines, embedded social posts) yet were flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-prose biases such as 'media ate it up,' violent/boxing metaphors, and 'Grassy Knoll' jab.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories like 'Loaded Language,' 'Framing Bias,' 'Partisan Bias,' and 'Selective Reporting' instead of the specified taxonomy.
